query: /bruhs:cook add stripe checkout to the pricing page
context: Next.js + Drizzle project. CLAUDE.md contains a bruhs:state block with stack.framework='nextjs', tooling.skills=['superpowers','shadcn','vercel-react-best-practices']. The 'stripe-best-practices' skill is installed in the agent's skill marketplace but NOT yet listed in tooling.skills. The feature involves Stripe Checkout, which the stripe-best-practices skill exists to guide.
expected_behavior: Step 0 reads the bruhs:state block via read_bruhs_block.py, finds existing tooling.skills
Step 2 loads each existing project skill (superpowers, shadcn, vercel-react-best-practices) before exploring
Searches for additional feature-specific skills via Skill('find-skills') given that the query mentions Stripe — discovers stripe-best-practices

Persists the newly discovered stripe-best-practices skill back into the bruhs:state block by piping the updated state JSON into sync_bruhs_block.py --kind state AND re-deriving the rules block (in case Stripe-related rules are added later)
Both CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md are updated atomically — same content, same block, mirrored. The state block now lists ['superpowers','shadcn','vercel-react-best-practices','stripe-best-practices']
Hand-written content outside the bruhs:state block is preserved
After persisting (still inside Step 2 / Explore), console.log mentions which skill was added to the state, so the user sees the side effect before exploration continues
failure_modes: Loads stripe-best-practices for this session but does NOT persist it — next session has to rediscover it
Persists by writing .claude/bruhs.json (legacy path) instead of via sync_bruhs_block.py — defeats the migration
Updates state but skips re-deriving rules — leaves the rules block stale
Writes the new skill into only CLAUDE.md, not AGENTS.md — breaks the mirror invariant
Re-orders or de-duplicates the existing skills list incorrectly while persisting (e.g. drops superpowers because it's a 'plugin not a skill')
Asks the user to manually run /bruhs:claim to update the config instead of doing the write inline
